name: ghostchain
description: A censorship-resistant privacy protocol for cross-chain stablecoin transfers using ZK-SNARK proofs, ephemeral contracts, and intent-based routing.
author: Mohammad Nazarnejad

scripts.build:production: FOUNDRY_PROFILE=production npm run build && npm run build:zk:full
scripts.build:docker: docker build -t ghostchain-solver -f relayer/Dockerfile relayer/ && docker build -t ghostchain-zk-prover -f zk/Dockerfile zk/
scripts.deploy:production: cd contracts && PRODUCTION_MODE=true BOOTSTRAP_MODE=false forge script script/DeployFactory.s.sol --rpc-url $RPC_URL --broadcast --verify -vvv
scripts.deploy:testnet:arbitrum-sepolia: cd contracts && forge script script/DeployFactory.s.sol --rpc-url arbitrum_sepolia --broadcast --verify
scripts.deploy:testnet:base-sepolia: cd contracts && forge script script/DeployFactory.s.sol --rpc-url base_sepolia --broadcast --verify
scripts.publish:sdk: npm run build -w sdk && npm publish -w sdk
scripts.publish:relayer: npm run build -w relayer && npm publish -w relayer
scripts.publish:zk: npm run build:all -w zk && npm publish -w zk
scripts.version:bump: npm version patch --workspaces && npm version patch
